name: 7'x10' Tonal Rectangular Woven Area Rug Khaki - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your indoor or outdoor decor with this Tonal Rectangular Woven Area Rug from Threshold™. This rug features a tonal pattern of khaki bands with a bordered design in alternating colors, adding a modern touch to your flooring. Designed with a flat-pile construction and spray-latex backing, it’s a great choice for high-traffic areas. Plus, it can be easily cleaned with a hose for effortless upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
